ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Course code (e.g., STAT101) */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered (e.g., Fall 2023) */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisite courses or requirements */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits the course is worth */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the course */,
  "course_type" TEXT /* Type of course (e.g., lecture, lab, seminar) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the instructor's office */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours for the instructor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the instructor */,
  "profile_image" TEXT /* URL or path to the instructor's profile image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the schedule entry belongs to */,
  "week" TEXT /* Week number of the course */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the schedule entry */,
  "topics" TEXT /* Topics covered in the week */,
  "reading" TEXT /* Reading assignments for the week */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks for the week */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the class */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the class */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the class (e.g., room number, building) */,
  "attendance_required" INTEGER /* Whether attendance is required for the class */,
  "resources" TEXT /* Additional resources or links for the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_schedules_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "year_of_study" TEXT /* Year of study (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore) */,
  "adviser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student's academic adviser */,
  "gpa" TEXT /* Student's current GPA */,
  "profile_image" TEXT /* URL or path to the student's profile image */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "section" TEXT /* Section of the course (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "final_grade" TEXT /* Final grade of the student in the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Enrollment status (e.g., Active, Withdrawn) */,
  "audit" INTEGER /* Whether the student is auditing the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the assignment belongs to */,
  "assignment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assignment */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the assignment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assignment */,
  "points_possible" INTEGER /* Total points possible for the assignment */,
  "submission_type" TEXT /* Type of submission (e.g., online, paper) */,
  "submission_link" TEXT /* Link to the submission portal */,
  "grading_status" TEXT /* Status of the grading (e.g., Graded, Not Graded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date of submission */,
  "submission_link" TEXT /* Link to the submitted file */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received for the submission */,
  "instructor_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the instructor */,
  "late" INTEGER /* Whether the submission was late */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "section_name" TEXT /* Name of the section (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the section */,
  "current_students" INTEGER /* Current number of students in the section */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sections_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Faculty, Student, Teaching Assistant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
